02-REQ-043.note: Management page limited to identity/nomination/membership (incl. captain transfer and coach designation), never competitive configuration; seam — nomination and healthcheck semantics belong to the team-server-management story.

03-REQ-046.note: Roster mutations (member add/remove, captaincy, server-nomination changes) rejected while a team's game is playing (dedupe with 05-REQ-013; 03-REVIEW-006 hard-rejection semantics).

05-REQ-008.note: Persistent team record: name, display colour, structural captain; the nullable nominated-server-domain field is anchored on this record — nomination semantics seam to team-server-management.

05-REQ-011.note: Membership records; every member is an Operator; captaincy structural on the team record, not a per-member role (05-REVIEW-014).

05-REQ-012.note: Captain adds/removes members and transfers captaincy, freeze-gated; seam — the in-game operator-boot affordance half is an in-game control owned by the operator-control/turn-pacing stories, and per-operator tempo was already not a captain authority.

05-REQ-013.note: Reject membership/captaincy mutation while playing (dedupe with 03-REQ-046); the tournament-wide extension (05-REQ-064) is authored by the tournaments change, citing the extensible freeze interval.

05-REQ-015a.note: Archive-only, never delete (05-REVIEW-011); the 'no playing game / no active tournament' gate is expressed via the (extensible) roster freeze. The legacy '(or an admin)' unarchive parenthetical is dropped per this change's Open Question option A — revisit if option B is chosen.

05-REQ-068a.note: Coach designations on the team record, distinct from the roster, observable to members; captain-only designation carried by team-management/captain-authority (the 05-REQ-067 designation half); coach live-read semantics stay with the live-game-observation story.

08-REQ-023b.note: Team Management view for every member: identity, captain, roster, coaches, nomination + health status. The stale 'members with their roles' phrase is not carried (roles eliminated by 05-REVIEW-014); healthcheck semantics seam to team-server-management.

08-REQ-023c.note: Any authenticated user creates a team; creator becomes captain (and first member).

08-REQ-023d.note: UI mirror folded: captain-exclusive mutating affordances are scenarios of the owning authority requirement — enforcement authored once, server-side.

08-REQ-023e.note: UI mirror folded: frozen affordances visibly disabled with an explanation, never a bypass.

03-REVIEW-006.note: Mid-game roster edits hard-rejected (option A strengthened) — the freeze keeps the live record coherent with the binding snapshot; the snapshot-binding half lives in identity-and-authorization/roster-snapshot-binding and the append-only-attribution half with the replay-and-audit story.

05-REVIEW-011.note: Team deletion disallowed; archive flag hides from listings and new enrolments while preserving all live and historical state.

05-REVIEW-014.note: Timekeeper role eliminated; captaincy enforced structurally via the team record's single captain reference; membership carries no role information — every member is an Operator.
